title: A Trip to the City
article_text: Last week, I felt a shock when I saw the new theater near my home. The building is very comfortable and has a usual design for a modern theater. I will pack my camera carefully before I go there tomorrow. I recall that my friend bought a bottle of wine for the opening event. The theater will manufacture its own coffee for visitors. I can swim in the pool next to the theater, which is a great freedom. A cycle path is under construction near the museum. My dear friend has a clear objective to visit every museum in the city. The volume of visitors to the theater has increased a lot. I will invest in a good location for my next project, and then proceed with the plan.

sentences.en: Last week, I felt a shock when I saw the new theater near my home.
sentences.zh: 上周，当我看到我家附近的新剧院时，我感到震惊。

words.eng_def: a sudden feeling of surprise or fear
a place where plays or movies are shown

sentences.en: The building is very comfortable and has a usual design for a modern theater.
sentences.zh: 这座建筑非常舒适，并且有现代剧院的常见设计。

words.eng_def: making you feel relaxed and without pain
happening or done most of the time

sentences.en: I will pack my camera carefully before I go there tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 我明天去那里之前会仔细地打包我的相机。

words.eng_def: to put things into a container for travel or storage
a device for taking pictures or videos
with great attention to avoid mistakes or harm

sentences.en: I recall that my friend bought a bottle of wine for the opening event.
sentences.zh: 我记得我的朋友为开幕活动买了一瓶葡萄酒。

words.eng_def: to remember something
an alcoholic drink made from grapes

sentences.en: The theater will manufacture its own coffee for visitors.
sentences.zh: 这家剧院将为参观者制作自己的咖啡。

words.eng_def: to make something in a factory or using machines
a hot drink made from coffee beans
a person who visits a place
Common English word. (definition needs review)

sentences.en: I can swim in the pool next to the theater, which is a great freedom.
sentences.zh: 我可以在剧院旁边的游泳池游泳，这是一种很大的自由。

words.eng_def: to move through water using your arms and legs
the right to do what you want without control

sentences.en: A cycle path is under construction near the museum.
sentences.zh: 博物馆附近有一条自行车道正在建设中。

words.eng_def: to ride a bicycle
the process of building something
a building where objects of art or science are kept and shown

sentences.en: My dear friend has a clear objective to visit every museum in the city.
sentences.zh: 我亲爱的朋友有一个明确的目标：参观城里的每一家博物馆。

words.eng_def: loved or liked very much
something you want to achieve

sentences.en: The volume of visitors to the theater has increased a lot.
sentences.zh: 到剧院参观的人数大大增加了。

words.eng_def: the amount of something, or the level of sound

sentences.en: I will invest in a good location for my next project, and then proceed with the plan.
sentences.zh: 我将投资一个好地点用于我的下一个项目，然后继续执行计划。

words.eng_def: to put money into something to make a profit
a place or position
to continue doing something
